actions.what: Event risk: Middle East oil/rates shock can affect new-buy timing
actions.your_move: Review exposure, hedges, and new buys before acting today: Middle East oil/rates shock can affect new-buy timing (oil, rates, volatility, energy, growth). If the event changes oil/rates/vol or a held sleeve, decide whether to hold, hedge, trim, or wait.

actions.what: Conviction gap: NVDA is under target
actions.your_move: NVDA is 6.6% vs 12.0% target. Decide: add with funding, hold below target with a written reason, cut the target, or remove it from the model. If adding, run the pre-trade gate; no auto-buy.
actions.why: Target drift shows a 5.4pp sizing gap vs the AI working model.
actions.sizing: Gap to target: 5.4pp; target is directional, not an order.

signal_log.signal: Macro: complacent vol plus steep curve cyclical tailwind
signal_log.note: VIX near 16 and 2s10s near +41 bps create risk-on/financials tailwind context; hedge cost may be favorable. Watch-only.

signal_log.signal: Iran escalation: US strikes plus prediction-market divergence
signal_log.note: Fresh strikes and whale prediction-market divergence create fast geopolitical risk context for defense, nuclear fuel, and safe-haven sleeves. Watch-only.

signal_log.signal: Oil rallying on Iran/Hormuz, inflation and macro watch
signal_log.note: USO rose roughly 5% week-over-week as Hormuz disruption stayed relevant; matters as inflation/rates input ahead of FOMC. Watch-only.

signal_log.signal: Oil spike on renewed Iran-US strikes
signal_log.ticker: USO, ITA, LEU, UUUU, CCJ, BWXT, BE
signal_log.note: Oil shock can pressure AI-heavy multiples through inflation/rates while supporting defense and nuclear/critical-minerals watch sleeves. Watch-only.

signal_log.signal: Oil down on US-Iran de-escalation and nuclear-deal expectations
signal_log.ticker: LEU, UUUU, CCJ, BWXT, BE, ITA
signal_log.note: Lower oil and yields create a risk-on book tailwind but mixed read for nuclear, energy-transition, and defense sleeves; oil direction is the hard tell. Watch-only.
Higher metals tariffs and ended exemptions are a policy tailwind for domestic materials and critical-minerals exposure. Watch-only.

signal_log.signal: Growth-to-value rotation is pressuring held semis/AI exposure
signal_log.ticker: SMH, NVDA, MU, MAGS, GRNY, GRNJ, IGV, IVES, VOLT, QQQ
signal_log.note: Fundstrat Daily Technical Strategy says the June 5 drawdown looked like rotation from Growth into Value rather than a broad-market top. Semis and QQQ cracked while Healthcare, Energy, Materials, Industrials, and Financials held up better. Watch-only for held AI/semis concentration; no trade call.

signal_log.signal: QQQ and SOX support bands define next-week damage-control watch
signal_log.note: Fundstrat flagged QQQ roughly 703-705 and SOX roughly 12,114 as the first important support zones after the June 5 break. If those zones fail, the note shifts toward a deeper second leg lower. Watch-only timing signal for held semis and AI beta.

signal_log.signal: UW market tide stayed deeply risk-off into the June 5 close
signal_log.note: Unusual Whales market tide closed with sharply negative net call premium, positive net put premium, and negative net volume, confirming broad tape stress rather than an isolated single-name move. Watch-only flow context.

signal_log.signal: Strong jobs plus higher yields widened the broad tech drawdown
signal_log.note: AP market coverage on June 5 said a stronger-than-expected May jobs print pushed Treasury yields higher and helped trigger a tech-led selloff. Broad-market confirmation matches the Fundstrat rotation read. Watch-only.

signal_log.signal: TNX and crude reversal path still depends on Persian Gulf de-escalation
signal_log.note: Fundstrat Flash Insights argued yields could peak into next week and crude could keep easing if negotiation progress arrives in the Persian Gulf. This keeps rates/oil headline sensitivity live for financials, energy, and nuclear sleeves. Watch-only until confirmed.

rows.operator_question: What deserves scarce review time because the upside/downside skew may be unusually large?
rows.freshness_requirement: Discovery can tolerate 1-3 trading days, but promoted action still needs fresh confirmation.

groups.decision_use: Create review prompts, not trade instructions, until thesis and freshness checks pass.
Boost review priority only when independent evidence supports the flow anomaly.

Macro lane is not checked; stale or missing macro must remain visible.
Monthly Fundstrat state is not checked; do not overwrite with empty state.
Daily Fundstrat calls are not checked; snippet discovery is not a clear lane.
Archived Meridian thesis context is not checked when absent; do not treat it as fresh tactical evidence or a live-source gap.
Routine health is not checked; keep heartbeat absence visible.
Signal Log is not checked; missing fetch is not no signals.
Event Risk is not checked; missing headlines are not no event risk.
Daily Synthesis is not checked; vague or absent synthesis must not create trades.
Research Queue is not checked; do not overwrite or assume no research.
Catalysts are not checked; absence is not no near-term catalysts.
UW opportunity flow is not checked; missing cache is not quiet tape.
Action aging memory is not checked; missing store is not resolved actions.
Prospects are not checked; missing file is not no prospects.
Source-call cache is not checked; calibration remains provisional.
Inbox date calibration is not checked; do not treat persistence as fully calibrated.
